items.title: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.summary: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: An Amazon warehouse worker died on the job at Oregon facility
items.summary: Though Amazon has faced issues with warehouse safety, the company said that the death was not work related.

items.title: Daniel Moreno-Gama is facing federal charges for attacking Sam Altman’s home and OpenAI’s HQ
items.summary: Daniel Moreno-Gama is now facing federal charges after allegedly traveling from Texas to California with the intent to kill OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. On April 10th, he was arrested...
